about.title: About EstateHub
about.subtitle: We're on a mission to make real estate accessible, transparent, and stress-free for everyone. Founded in 2024, EstateHub has grown into one of the most trusted property platforms in the country.
about.missionText: To democratize real estate by giving everyone — buyers, sellers, and investors — the tools they need to make confident decisions. We believe that finding your dream home shouldn't require an army of agents or a stack of paperwork.
about.valuesSubtitle: Our values guide every decision we make.
about.peopleFirstDesc: Every feature we build starts with the question: does this help our users find or sell their home faster?
about.transparencyDesc: No hidden fees, no inflated listings. We believe in honest, verified information for every property.
about.qualityDesc: Every listing goes through our approval process. We maintain high standards so you don't have to worry.
about.accessibilityDesc: Whether you're a first-time buyer or a seasoned investor, EstateHub is built for everyone.
about.teamSubtitle: A passionate group of real estate and technology enthusiasts building the future of home buying.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.subtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you. Our team is ready to help with anything you need.
contactPage.reachOutSubtitle: Whether you have a question about listings, pricing, or anything else, our team is here to help.
contactPage.sendMessageSubtitle: Fill out the form and we'll respond within 24 hours.
contactPage.subject: Subject
contactPage.messagePlaceholder: Tell us more about your inquiry…
contactPage.messageSentDesc: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contactPage.faq1q: How do I list a property?
contactPage.faq1a: Sign up for a free account, go to your Seller Dashboard, and click 'New Listing'. You can list up to 2 properties for free.
contactPage.faq2q: Is it free to browse properties?
contactPage.faq2a: Yes! Browsing and searching properties on EstateHub is completely free. No account required.
contactPage.faq3q: How long does listing approval take?
contactPage.faq3a: Our admin team reviews new listings within 24 hours. You'll receive a notification once your listing is approved.
contactPage.faq4q: Can I edit my listing after publishing?
contactPage.faq4a: Absolutely. Go to your Seller Dashboard → Manage tab, and click the edit icon on any listing to update details and images.

pricing.title: Start Listing for Free
pricing.subtitle: List up to 2 properties at no cost. Upgrade when you're ready to grow.
pricing.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about our plans.
pricing.faqCancel: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
pricing.faqCancelA: Yes! You can cancel your subscription at any time from your Seller Dashboard under the Subscription tab. Your access continues until the end of your current billing period — no partial refunds, but no surprise charges either.
pricing.faqSwitchA: Absolutely. You can upgrade from Seller Pro to Unlimited at any time. To downgrade, simply cancel your current plan and subscribe to the lower tier once your billing period ends.
pricing.faqAnnualA: When you choose annual billing, you pay for 12 months upfront at a 20% discount compared to the monthly price. For Seller Pro that's $96/year instead of $120, and for Unlimited it's $864/year instead of $1,080.
pricing.faqListings: What happens to my listings if I downgrade?
pricing.faqListingsA: Your existing listings stay active, but you won't be able to create new ones until you're within your plan's limit. For example, if you have 10 listings and downgrade to Free (2 listings), your 10 listings remain live but you can't add more until you remove some or upgrade again.
pricing.faqPayment: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.faqPaymentA: We process all payments securely through PayPal. You can pay with your PayPal balance, linked bank account, or any major credit or debit card through PayPal's checkout.
pricing.faqFreePlan: Is the Free plan really free forever?
pricing.faqFreePlanA: Yes — the Free plan lets you list up to 2 properties at no cost, with no time limit and no credit card required. Upgrade only when you need more listings or premium features.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1text: By accessing or using EstateHub, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
terms.s2text: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and all activities that occur under your account. You must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account.
terms.s3text: All property listings are subject to review and approval. You must have the right to list any property you submit. Misrepresentation of property details may result in account suspension.
terms.s4text: Free accounts can list up to 2 properties. Seller Pro subscription provides unlimited listings and premium features for $10/month, billed through PayPal.
terms.s5text: EstateHub is a marketplace platform. We do not guarantee the accuracy of listings or the outcome of any transaction. Users engage in transactions at their own risk.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.s1text: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, and property listing details when you create an account or list a property. We also collect usage data including pages visited, search queries, and interaction patterns to improve our service.
privacyPage.s2text: We use collected information to provide and improve our services, process transactions, send notifications about your listings, and communicate with you about your account. We never sell your personal information to third parties.
privacyPage.s3text: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data, including encryption in transit and at rest, regular security audits, and strict access controls for our team members.
privacyPage.s4text: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information at any time through your account settings. You can also request a complete export of your data by contacting our support team.
privacyPage.s5text: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at hello@estatehub.com or call 1-800-123-4567.
